Test Case Description: Verify homepage loads successfully
Preconditions: User is a guest; Homepage URL is accessible; Site environment is correctly configured
Expected Result: Homepage loads without error, blank screen, or broken layout

Test Case Description: Verify correct region-specific content is displayed
Expected Result: Region-specific content such as currency and messaging is correct for AU/NZ

Test Case Description: Verify homepage loads over HTTPS
Expected Result: Page loads securely without browser security warning

Test Case Description: Verify no visible application error is shown on homepage
Expected Result: No visible application error, exception page, or major JS crash UI is shown

Test Case Description: Verify homepage remains stable after refresh
Steps: 1. Open homepage 2. Refresh page multiple times
Expected Result: Homepage reloads consistently without layout or content breakage

Test Case Description: Verify brand logo is displayed
Expected Result: Logo is visible and rendered correctly

Test Case Description: Verify clicking logo redirects user to homepage
Expected Result: User is redirected to homepage

Test Case Description: Verify main navigation is displayed
Expected Result: Main navigation items are visible and usable

Test Case Description: Verify top navigation links redirect correctly
Expected Result: Each navigation item opens the correct PLP or content page

Test Case Description: Verify submenu opens correctly on desktop
Preconditions: Desktop viewport; Menu item with submenu exists
Steps: 1. Hover on a menu item with submenu
Expected Result: Submenu opens with expected links and layout

Test Case Description: Verify search entry point is available from homepage
Expected Result: Search icon or input is accessible

Test Case Description: Verify search with valid keyword redirects to search results
Steps: 1. Open search 2. Enter valid keyword 3. Submit
Expected Result: Search results page opens with relevant results

Test Case Description: Verify search with invalid keyword shows no-result state
Steps: 1. Open search 2. Enter invalid keyword 3. Submit
Expected Result: No-result state is shown without UI break

Test Case Description: Verify account entry point is displayed
Expected Result: Account icon or link is visible and usable

Test Case Description: Verify cart entry point and empty state for guest user
Expected Result: Cart icon is visible and default state is correct

Test Case Description: Verify hero banner is displayed
Expected Result: Hero banner loads correctly

Test Case Description: Verify hero banner CTA redirects correctly
Expected Result: CTA opens the correct destination page

Test Case Description: Verify hero banner image is rendered correctly
Expected Result: Banner image is not broken, stretched, or cropped incorrectly

Test Case Description: Verify promotional carousel can be navigated manually
Expected Result: Carousel slides change correctly via controls

Test Case Description: Verify promotional carousel auto-rotation if enabled
Expected Result: Carousel rotates correctly when auto-rotation is enabled

Test Case Description: Verify promotional tiles/cards are displayed
Expected Result: Promotional tiles are visible and aligned

Test Case Description: Verify promotional tile CTA redirects correctly
Expected Result: Promotional tile opens the correct destination page

Test Case Description: Verify category entry points are displayed
Expected Result: Category links or tiles are visible

Test Case Description: Verify category entry points redirect to correct PLP
Expected Result: Selected category opens the correct PLP

Test Case Description: Verify destination category content is relevant
Expected Result: Products/content on destination page match chosen category

Test Case Description: Verify featured product module is displayed
Expected Result: Product module is visible

Test Case Description: Verify product card displays required elements
Expected Result: Product card shows image, name, and price

Test Case Description: Verify clicking product card redirects to PDP
Expected Result: Correct PDP opens

Test Case Description: Verify product price format matches selected region
Expected Result: Currency and price format are correct for AU/NZ

Test Case Description: Verify sale price presentation is correct
Expected Result: Sale price and original price are shown correctly where applicable

Test Case Description: Verify product availability state is represented correctly
Expected Result: Availability status is shown correctly where applicable

Test Case Description: Verify quick action opens correctly if feature exists
Expected Result: Quick Add or Quick View opens correctly

Test Case Description: Verify footer is displayed
Expected Result: Footer is visible and rendered correctly

Test Case Description: Verify footer links redirect correctly
Expected Result: Each footer link opens the correct destination

Test Case Description: Verify social links redirect correctly
Expected Result: Each social icon opens the correct social destination

Test Case Description: Verify legal text is displayed
Expected Result: Legal or copyright text is present

Test Case Description: Verify no overlapping UI elements on homepage
Expected Result: No overlapping issue among sticky header, chat widget, banners, cards, or footer

Test Case Description: Verify homepage text is readable
Expected Result: No text is truncated, hidden, or unreadable

Test Case Description: Verify images are rendered without distortion
Expected Result: Images maintain expected aspect ratio and clarity

Test Case Description: Verify sticky header behavior on scroll
Expected Result: Sticky header behaves correctly during scroll

Test Case Description: Verify homepage layout on desktop viewport
Expected Result: Desktop layout is correct

Test Case Description: Verify homepage layout on tablet viewport
Expected Result: Tablet layout adapts correctly

Test Case Description: Verify homepage layout on mobile viewport
Expected Result: Mobile layout adapts correctly without horizontal overflow

Test Case Description: Verify hamburger menu opens correctly on mobile
Expected Result: Hamburger menu opens correctly

Test Case Description: Verify mobile navigation links redirect correctly
Expected Result: Selected mobile navigation item redirects correctly

Test Case Description: Verify homepage load performance is acceptable
Expected Result: Homepage loads within acceptable threshold

Test Case Description: Verify repeated navigation from homepage does not break page
Steps: 1. Navigate through multiple homepage links 2. Return to homepage
Expected Result: No crash, freeze, or persistent broken state occurs

Test Case Description: Verify homepage visible links do not lead to broken pages
Expected Result: No visible homepage link leads to 404, 500, or unexpected error page

Test Case Description: Verify hero banner click tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected analytics event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify category click tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected analytics event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify product click tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected analytics event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify click-event metadata is correct
Steps: 1. Trigger homepage click events 2. Inspect payload
Expected Result: Event metadata such as region, module, position, and destination are correct
